positive: A sophisticated, central composition featuring stylized mountain peaks and surrounding bioluminescent celestial elements, forming a cohesive woodland-sky silhouette. The primary color palette should use deep indigo, muted teal, and pops of luminous neon green and soft lavender, creating high contrast suitable for apparel. Focus on clean, graphic edges and strong negative space. Incorporate stylized constellations, delicate star trails, and the abstract shapes of giant ferns or stylized crystalline forms that interweave with the mountain outlines. Minimalist vaporwave meets natural wilderness aesthetic. Perfect for screen printing, high resolution, vector-like quality.
